title: Trump Says Iran Agreed to Allow 20 More Ships of Oil Through Strait of Hormuz
summary_full: The president, speaking to reporters on Air Force One, cast the permission as a “sign of respect.” He also asserted that the United States had already achieved “regime change” in Iran.
summary_public: The president, speaking to reporters on Air Force One, cast the permission as a “sign of respect.” He also asserted that the United States had already achieved “regime change” in Iran.

IR.label: neutral
